_meta.provenance: Module-specific data catalogue: the datasets each module needs, where they come from, and how they must be governed. All entries are Proposed requirements. Classification and consent notes follow the DPDP Act 2023 framing (verified in the systems register). Modules not listed have not been authored yet.

datasets.name: Organisation hierarchy
datasets.purpose: The node tree: Ministry → NSB/SAI → Regional Centre → State → District → Facility/Centre.
datasets.sourceSystem: Official org charts (documents) — no digital source system exists
datasets.consent: not-required
datasets.validation: Nodal-officer confirmation cycle; parent-child integrity checks
datasets.accessRoles: Public read; scoped editors per subtree

datasets.name: Role–officer assignments
datasets.purpose: Which role sits at which node, and who currently holds it.
datasets.consent: Notification to officers; personal contacts restricted per A-M1-2
datasets.validation: Order-number reference required; succession log on every change

datasets.name: Sanctioned vs filled posts
datasets.purpose: Vacancy view for capacity planning.
datasets.consent: not-required; publication scope needs A-M1-1
datasets.validation: Totals reconcile with establishment records

datasets.name: Recognition register
datasets.purpose: Status of every NSF: recognised / provisional / suspended / derecognised, with orders.
datasets.consent: not-required (statutory public information)
datasets.collectionMethod: manual-entry with order upload; batch from NSB when available
datasets.validation: Order document attached; status transitions follow the Act
datasets.storage: Mirror — NSB register is the system of record

datasets.name: Office-bearer register
datasets.purpose: Tenure and cooling-off tracking per the NSGA 2025.
datasets.consent: Statutory filing basis; publication per Act
datasets.validation: Tenure arithmetic against Act limits; election-document reference

datasets.name: Compliance filings
datasets.purpose: Elections held, accounts filed, safe-sport mechanisms — the scorecard inputs.
datasets.consent: not-required
datasets.validation: Due-date engine from the Act; document presence checks

datasets.name: Affiliation tree
datasets.purpose: NSF → state association → district unit, so every result is traceable to a sanctioning body.
datasets.consent: not-required
datasets.validation: Territory overlaps flagged; orphan units flagged

datasets.name: Scheme master
datasets.purpose: Structured eligibility rules, benefits, documents required, deadlines for every onboarded scheme.
datasets.consent: not-required
datasets.validation: Rules reviewed by scheme division; test cases per rule
datasets.storage: Platform registry (system of record for the encoded rules)

datasets.name: Applications
datasets.purpose: The applicant's submission, documents and state of processing.
datasets.consent: Explicit purpose-wise consent at submission; guardian consent for minors (A-P2)
datasets.validation: Eligibility engine pre-checks; document verification workflow
datasets.storage: Platform (system of record); retention per DPDP policy
datasets.accessRoles: Applicant (own); scoped officers; audit log on every view

datasets.name: File-movement events
datasets.purpose: Desk-level position and days-pending for each application's file.
datasets.consent: not-required
datasets.validation: File-number mapping integrity; gap detection
datasets.storage: Mirror — eOffice is the system of record
datasets.accessRoles: Applicant sees own file position; leadership sees delay analytics

datasets.name: Payment status
datasets.purpose: Sanction → release → utilisation / DBT credit against each approved application.
datasets.consent: Covered by application consent; bank details never stored on platform
datasets.validation: Stage-sequence checks; amount reconciliation
datasets.storage: Mirror — PFMS is the system of record

datasets.name: Grievance cases
datasets.purpose: Case record: subject, jurisdiction, resolver, SLA clock, resolution.
datasets.sensitivity: high (can include safeguarding matters involving minors)
datasets.consent: Complainant consent at filing; safeguarding cases sealed to authorised roles
datasets.validation: Validity filter (duplicates, RTI, sub-judice); jurisdiction check via M1
datasets.storage: Platform (system of record for sports-channel cases)
datasets.accessRoles: Complainant (own); resolver chain; sealed track for safeguarding

datasets.name: Escalation & SLA events
datasets.purpose: Every SLA breach and escalation hop — the accountability trail.
datasets.consent: not-required
datasets.validation: Escalation matrix rules (A-M4-2)

datasets.name: Message campaigns & consent
datasets.purpose: Targeted communications: audience definition, templates, delivery, read receipts, opt-outs.
datasets.consent: Channel consent per DPDP; opt-out honoured platform-wide
datasets.validation: Audience filters run on verified registry data only; template approval state

datasets.name: School register
datasets.purpose: The screening network's node list, keyed to UDISE+ codes.
datasets.consent: not-required
datasets.validation: Code checksum; dedupe against prior years
datasets.storage: Mirror — UDISE+ is the system of record
datasets.accessRoles: Public coverage map; operational detail for officials

datasets.name: Screening sessions
datasets.purpose: When and where each screening ran, by whom, with what equipment.
datasets.consent: not-required
datasets.validation: GPS/photo evidence optional; scout certification check

datasets.name: Child screening results
datasets.purpose: The individual test results that surface talent.
datasets.consent: Verifiable guardian consent BEFORE capture (A-M5-2); revocation honoured with deletion path
datasets.validation: Range checks per age band; assessor certification; outlier review
datasets.storage: Platform, sealed store; retention per DPDP policy
datasets.accessRoles: Guardian (own child); school PT teacher (own students); SAI talent team (shortlists); never public

datasets.name: Guardian consent records
datasets.purpose: The consent vault entries that make D-M5-3 lawful.
datasets.consent: Is itself the consent record
datasets.validation: Verifiability per approved mechanism (A-M5-2); audit trail immutable

datasets.name: Talent shortlists & KIRTI referrals
datasets.purpose: Top-percentile children routed to Talent Assessment Centres.
datasets.consent: Covered by screening consent scope; guardian notified at referral
datasets.validation: Percentile computation reproducible; referral acceptance logged
datasets.accessRoles: SAI talent team; guardian (own child); DSO (aggregate)

datasets.name: Scout register
datasets.purpose: Certified teacher-scouts with school affiliation and certification state.
datasets.consent: Enrolment consent at registration (teachers are adults acting in public role)
datasets.validation: School affiliation vs UDISE+; education-department nomination check
datasets.accessRoles: Public: scout count by district; identity visible to officials and own school

datasets.name: Scout activity log
datasets.purpose: Screenings run, children assessed, talents flagged — the basis for recognition.
datasets.consent: Covered by scout enrolment
datasets.validation: Cross-check with M5 session records; DEO verification

datasets.name: Recognition ledger
datasets.purpose: Certificates, awards and career credits granted to scouts.
datasets.consent: Covered by enrolment; publication with scout consent
datasets.validation: Basis must reference verified activity

datasets.name: Discovery attribution records
datasets.purpose: 'First scouted by' credit linking athletes to the scout who found them.
datasets.consent: Visible on athlete profile with athlete/guardian consent
datasets.validation: Earliest verified session wins; dispute path per Q26
datasets.accessRoles: Athlete, scout, officials; public with consent

datasets.name: Athlete master profile
datasets.purpose: The identity-anchored core: who the athlete is, KID, sport, cohort.
datasets.consent: Athlete consent (guardian for minors) at profile activation
datasets.validation: eKYC dedupe (D-M7-4); NSRS reconciliation
datasets.storage: Identity mirror — NSRS is system of record; platform holds the extended profile
datasets.accessRoles: Athlete (own, full); officials scoped; public sees only consented showcase fields

datasets.name: Performance results
datasets.purpose: Competition results feeding the verified career timeline.
datasets.sourceSystem: M8 events + federation submissions + Khelo India GMS
datasets.consent: Competition participation implies results processing; publication per showcase consent
datasets.validation: Only sanctioned events (A-M8-1); federation sign-off (A-M7-4)
datasets.storage: Platform (system of record for the consolidated timeline)
datasets.accessRoles: Athlete; selectors; public sees consented highlights

datasets.name: Physical & sports-science assessments
datasets.purpose: KIRTI, Fit India and SAI centre assessments — the development curve.
datasets.consent: Explicit consent per battery; guardian consent for minors
datasets.validation: Centre accreditation; instrument calibration records where available
datasets.storage: Platform sealed store; retention per DPDP policy pending Q27
datasets.accessRoles: Athlete/guardian; treating sports-science staff; talent team (scoped); never public

datasets.name: Identity verification events
datasets.purpose: eKYC checks and dedupe decisions that keep one-person-one-profile true.
datasets.consent: eKYC consent per transaction; raw Aadhaar numbers never stored
datasets.validation: Dual-control on merge decisions (data steward R7)

datasets.name: AI talent scores
datasets.purpose: Advisory talent indicators derived from results + assessments.
datasets.consent: Athlete informed; score visible to athlete with explanation; appeal path per A-M7-2
datasets.validation: Model card + bias audit (A-M7-2); reproducible from inputs snapshot
datasets.accessRoles: Athlete (own, with explanation); selectors (advisory-labeled); never public

datasets.name: Event register
datasets.purpose: Every sanctioned event: sanctioning body, level, venue, calendar slot.
datasets.sourceSystem: Platform-native; GMS for Khelo India Games
datasets.consent: not-required
datasets.validation: Sanctioning body checked against M2 affiliation tree
datasets.storage: Platform (system of record for the national calendar)

datasets.name: Entries & participation
datasets.purpose: Who entered, who started, who completed — keyed to KID.
datasets.consent: Entry consent (guardian for minors); publication limited to start lists per event policy
datasets.validation: Identity via NSRS; age-category checks against date of birth

datasets.name: Results & medal records
datasets.purpose: Verified outcomes: placings, marks, medal tallies.
datasets.consent: Competition rules; public per event policy
datasets.validation: Evidence standard per Q30 (timing export, referee sign-off); federation verification
datasets.accessRoles: Public results; audit trail for officials

datasets.name: Officials & technical staff assignments
datasets.purpose: Who officiated what — accountability and workload view.
datasets.consent: Officiating role implies listing; contact details restricted
datasets.validation: Official registered on NSRS/federation rolls

datasets.name: Certificates issued
datasets.purpose: Digital participation/medal certificates pushed to DigiLocker.
datasets.consent: Issuance on request/entry consent
datasets.validation: Signed artefacts; revocation path for corrected results
